channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Get Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2 and 13 other great PC games for $15
item.description: The aptly-named “2K Megahits 2026 Bundle” from Humble includes 15 Steam games for $15. It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain 2, Borderlands 3, and XCOM: Enemy Unknown. The bundle will be available until August 7th, though the bundle page notes that keys for […]

item.title: The PlayStation replica ornament is an homage to a great, yet fragile console
item.description: You probably know the signature PlayStation boot sound. Did you know that it's technically a multi-part chime? There's the synthy section where "Sony Computer Entertainment" shows onscreen with a white background. You only get to the next screen with the echo-y chimes and the color-filled PlayStation logo if your console recognizes the disc. How badly […]...

item.title: Fans Flocked to World Cup Host Cities—Causing 80 Percent of the Tournament’s Emissions
item.description: The latest estimates reveal that the majority of greenhouse gas emissions from large-scale events such as the FIFA World Cup stem from spectators traveling to host cities.

item.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
item.description: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

item.title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
item.description: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.

item.title: Ford’s $30,000 electric truck: all the news about the company’s big EV re-do
item.description: The end of the Ford F-150 Lightning was also the start of a new era for the automaker. After failing to capture the market with the electric version of its popular F-Series truck, Ford is going back to the drawing board with its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform. The first offering will be a $30,000 electric […]

item.title: Natural raises $30M to reinvent payments for AI agents — and take on Stripe
item.description: The one-year-old startup aims to reinvent financial architecture for autonomous AI transactions.

item.title: Even Mild Sleep Deprivation May Lead to Weight Gain
item.description: A recent study suggests that not getting enough sleep increases the risk of weight gain, and thus of conditions like heart disease and type 2 diabetes.

item.title: Nvidia is building the world's first 'national AI' — Japan's FRONTia Project could be the next big step forward in global progress, but is this a step too far?
item.description: The Japanese government, Noetra Corp, and Nvidia are building an AI project that it believes will deliver physical AI and underpin Japan’s entire AI ecosystem

item.title: 14 juillet 2015 : la sonde New Horizons avait vu un détail sur Pluton que les scientifiques viennent de comprendre
item.description: Pluton est trop petite pour avoir gardé significativement la chaleur de sa naissance et pourtant sa surface porte d'étonnantes traces de son activité planétaire. Une équipe de chercheurs vient d'en découvrir une nouvelle preuve dans les archives des données prises lors du survol de Pluton en 2015.

item.title: University engineers have figured out how to build an 'invisible' drone — here's the science behind it
item.description: Phantom Twist doesn't use camouflage to hide. Instead, this drone spins so fast that human eyes can't resolve its shape. It's a clever piece of engineering, although a working camera remains an unsolved problem.

item.title: Netflix brings ASL interpretations to dozens of shows and movies for kids
item.description: Netflix has teamed up with a company called SignUp Media to offer ASL interpretations on a bunch of kids shows and movies.

item.title: Everything to know before putting a car key on your iPhone
item.description: Do you need to be in your car to set up your digital car key?

item.title: Judge halts Paramount and Warner merger for at least two weeks per states’ request
item.description: The states’ top prosecutors called on Warner and Paramount to not close the transaction until after a court had time to ‘fully evaluate’ their claims. A federal judge on Monday ordered Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery to halt their $81 billion merger for at least two weeks, allowing states that are challenging the deal more time to see their case through in court....
